market_pulse: Competitive momentum building across premium venues with multiple headline DJ confirmations for May weekends; Martin Garrix at OMNIA Dayclub (5/15), Marshmello at Encore Beach, and Lil Wayne at Zouk signal strong talent pull.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA Dayclub, Encore Beach, and Zouk are leveraging early-week announcements for May 15-18 events with strong promo velocity. LIV's social posting cadence appears lighter in comparison.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase Instagram/TikTok posting frequency for upcoming LIV weekend headliners; emphasize exclusive Fontainebleau talent angles.

content_gaps.description: Competitors are driving organic TikTok/IG Reels through event countdowns and behind-the-scenes content. LIV Beach has less visible creator-tag activity.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch creator outreach program; offer early-access passes for TikTok influencers 48h before headline events.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: High-engagement nightlife content creator; actively posting Vegas club coverage and may amplify LIV events.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_approach: Reach out for bottle-service partnership on next headline weekend.
